angles.name: lost_traffic
angles.template:
I was searching for {category} options in {location} and noticed {business_name} doesn't have a website yet. Most people search online before choosing where to eat — without a site, you're invisible to that traffic.

A simple 1-page site with your menu, hours, and location is all you need to start getting found.

Would you be open to a quick chat about it?

angles.name: competition
angles.template:
Your competitors in {location} are showing up online with menus and reservation links. {business_name} doesn't have a website — meaning potential customers find them before they find you.

A basic website levels the playing field. Cheap, fast, and easy to update.

Worth a 5-minute conversation?

angles.name: delivery_trend
angles.template:
More people in {location} are ordering takeout and delivery online every year. If {business_name} isn't showing up in Google searches with a menu and contact info, you're leaving money on the table.

I build affordable websites for {category} businesses. Usually done in a week.

Interested in seeing what that looks like?
